basic_details.job_title: DHS Ramanathapuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for ICTC Counsellors and ICTC Lab Technician Posts
basic_details.post_name: ICTC Counsellors and ICTC Lab Technician
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Ramanathapuram (DHS Ramanathapuram) has released the official ICTC Counsellors and ICTC Lab Technician Notification 2026 on 02 June 2026. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the DHS Ramanathapuram Recruitment 2026, including 4 posts for ICTC Counsellors and 4 posts for ICTC Lab Technicians. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Bachelor’s Degree in Psychology, Sociology, or Social Work for Counsellor posts, and CMLT/DMLT from Government-approved institutions for Lab Technician posts, can apply through offline mode. The application process must be

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Psychology, Sociology, Social Work, CMLT, DMLT in Government approved institutions.
qualification.details: ICTC Counsellors: Bachelor Degree in Psychology, Sociology, Social Work. ICTC Lab Technician: CMLT, DMLT in Government approved institutions.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Ramanathapuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Ramanathapuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the DHS Ramanathapuram Recruitment 2026 is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ICTC Counsellors and ICTC Lab Technicians?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies. 4 vacancies are for ICTC Counsellors and 4 vacancies are for ICTC Lab Technicians.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For ICTC Counsellors, a Bachelor Degree in Psychology, Sociology, or Social Work is required. For ICTC Lab Technicians, CMLT or DMLT from government-approved institutions is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the DHS Ramanathapuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will be as per the NHM Norms.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.
